allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const html=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\); const m=html.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\); const last=m[m.length-1]; const js=last.replace\(/^<script>/,''\).replace\(/<\\/script>$/,''\); try { new Function\(js\); console.log\('JS OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('ERR:', e.message\); }")
